final:
module sram_cell (
    input wire [7:0] D,
    input wire WE,
    input wire RE,
    output reg [7:0] Q
);
    reg [7:0] memory;

    always @(*) begin
  if (WE) begin memory <= D ; // Write data to SRAM
  end
  end

  always @(*) begin
  if (RE) begin Q <= memory ; // Read data from SRAM
  end
  end
endmodule
